name: Roam HQ API
description:
The Roam HQ API is your programmatic interface to your all-in-one Virtual Office.

**OpenAPI Spec:** [openapi.json](https://developer.ro.am/openapi.json)

**Other APIs:**
- [On-Air API](https://developer.ro.am/docs/onair-api/on-air-api) (events, guests, attendance) — [onair.json](https://developer.ro.am/onair.json)
- [Alpha API](https://developer.ro.am/docs/chat-api/roam-hq-chat-api-alpha) (chat, users, meetings) — [chat.json](https://developer.ro.am/chat.json)
- [SCIM 2.0 API](https://developer.ro.am/docs/scim/roam-hq-scim-2-0-api) (user provisioning) — [scim.json](https://developer.ro.am/scim.json)
- [Webhooks API](https://developer.ro.am/docs/webhooks/roam-hq-events-api-alpha) (real-time events) — [webhooks.json](https://developer.ro.am/webhooks.json)

## Endpoints Overview

| Endpoint | Method | Description |
|----------|--------|-------------|
| [`/chat.sendMessage`](/docs/roam-api/send-message) | POST | Send a message to a group as a bot |
| [`/groups.list`](/docs/roam-api/list-groups) | GET | List all public groups in your Roam |
| [`/recording.list`](/docs/roam-api/list-recordings) | GET | List meeting recordings with optional date filtering |
| [`/messageevent.export`](/docs/roam-api/messageevent-export) | POST | Export daily message archives (DMs and group chats) |

## Common Use Cases

### Send Notifications to Groups
Integrate external services (CI/CD, monitoring, ticketing) to post alerts into Roam groups.
- Use [`/groups.list`](/docs/roam-api/list-groups) to let users pick a destination
- Use [`/chat.sendMessage`](/docs/roam-api/send-message) to post updates

### Compliance & Archival
Export message events daily for compliance, legal holds, or data warehousing.
- Use [`/messageevent.export`](/docs/roam-api/messageevent-export) to retrieve daily archives

### Process Recordings
Build workflows to archive or transcribe recordings.
- Use [`/recording.list`](/docs/roam-api/list-recordings) to fetch available recordings

## Authentication

All requests require a Bearer token. Create an API Key or OAuth app in **Roam Administration > Developer**.

```
Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY
```

## Base URL

```
https://api.ro.am/v1
```

---
Have questions? Contact us via [Roam Support Chat](https://ro.am/support/contact-us) or email [developer@ro.am](mailto:developer@ro.am).
